details: AC1: Agent delegation matrix implemented in agent-delegation.ts (PM->SM->PO->Dev->QA->DevOps pipeline + extended roles)
AC2: agent: <role> tag support added to TransitionDef in types.ts, engine processes agent tags in executeTransition
AC3: Handoff protocol <500 tokens implemented in handoff.ts with YAML generation, token estimation, size validation
AC4: Agent spawning as subprocess in agent-spawner.ts with git worktree support (optional, fallback to simple spawn)
AC5: Authority enforcement in authority-enforcer.ts with 10 agent roles, 40+ operations, default-deny policy
IV1: Multi-agent flow validated — full pipeline delegation sequence passes
IV2: Handoff artifacts generated between every agent transition — verified in E2E test
IV3: Agent without authority gets blocked with clear message — verified in test (Dev tries invalid transition)

codingStandards.typeScriptErrors: zero new errors (pre-existing errors in other files unchanged)
details: Files follow existing src/kernel/workflow/ structure and patterns

testing.edgeCases: Empty arrays, unknown roles, missing files, corrupted state, backward compat

summary: Story 2.4 fully implemented: agent-delegation.ts (delegation matrix + graph), agent-spawner.ts (subprocess spawn + worktree), handoff.ts (YAML artifact <500 tokens), authority-enforcer.ts (10 roles, 40+ operations), engine integration (agent-tagged transitions, handoff generation), and 73 comprehensive tests.
